---
name: Fix or correction
about: Something in the notes or code is wrong or unclear
title: "[FIX] "
labels: fix, good first issue
assignees: ''
---

**Which file has the issue?**
e.g. `phase-1-foundations/notes/pointers.md`

**What is wrong?**
Describe the mistake, typo, or confusing explanation clearly.

**What should it say instead?**
Your suggested correction (even a rough draft is helpful).

**Why does this matter?**
Optional — but helpful if it is a conceptual error, not just a typo.
